title: bony auto-weights input
description: Input to 'bony auto-weights'. Describes bone rest positions and mesh vertex world positions for automatic skin-weight computation.

name.description: Bone name (must match the target .bony skeleton).

worldX.description: Bone root world X position at bind pose.

worldY.description: Bone root world Y position at bind pose.

x.description: Vertex world X position at bind pose.

y.description: Vertex world Y position at bind pose.

maxInfluences.description: Maximum number of bone influences per vertex (default: 4).

epsilon.description: Distance regularization term to avoid division by zero for vertices exactly on a bone anchor (default: 1e-6).
